But let me think about what can improve accuracy:
- Higher dim (100 vs 50) - gives more capacity
- More epochs (20 vs 10) - more training
- wordNgrams=3 vs 2 - captures more context
- Lower minCount (3 vs 5) - more words included
- Larger bucket (500k vs 200k) - more subword features
